title: Kanokon
altTitles: Kanokon: The Girl Who Cried Fox
description:
Kouta Oyamada is a shy and innocent high school student who transfers from the countryside to a new school in the city, hoping to live a peaceful student life. However, his days quickly become chaotic after attracting the attention of Chizuru Minamoto, a beautiful upperclassman who is secretly a powerful fox spirit. Openly affectionate and extremely possessive, Chizuru constantly embarrasses Kouta with her bold behavior while trying to win his love.

As Kouta becomes involved with Chizuru and other supernatural beings, he finds himself caught between romance, jealousy, comedy, and magical conflicts. Despite the outrageous situations surrounding him, Kouta slowly begins forming deeper bonds with the people around him while learning more about the hidden world of spirits and yokai. Blending romance, supernatural elements, and ecchi comedy, Kanokon delivers a lighthearted yet chaotic story filled with humor and awkward moments.
